# Minimal Test Charter

> Fixture for tests/contract/test_charter_compact_includes_section_anchors.py

## Purpose

A small charter used to assert that compact and bootstrap views agree on
directive IDs, tactic IDs, and section anchors (FR-034).

## Directives

- DIRECTIVE_001: Cite spec authority before edits.
- DIRECTIVE_002: No silent fallback on missing data.

## Tactics

- TAC-001: Run pytest in headless mode for browser tests.

## Section Anchors Test

This subsection ensures multi-level headings are captured.
